hero.label: FRONTEND DEVELOPER
hero.description: Hello, I'm Sona. An enthusiastic Web Developer passionate about creating high-quality, user-friendly applications. I thrive in collaborative environments, eager to learn new technologies and always ready to take on challenges that drive both personal and team growth.

uateArmath.title: Coach (Part-time) - UATE-Armath EL
uateArmath.description: Conduct lessons in programming, robotics, and engineering for school-aged students. Develop interactive lesson plans covering Kturtle, Scratch, Arduino, and Raspberry Pi.

autoDream.title: Frontend Developer Intern - AutoDream
autoDream.description: Fix bugs, learn and apply modern frontend development practices. Build and maintain user interfaces using React, TypeScript, and modern web technologies.

ledOn.title: UI/UX Designer - LEDon startup
ledOn.description: Design and implement user-friendly interfaces for web and mobile applications. Collaborate with developers to ensure seamless user experiences.

technicalProficiency.title: Technical Proficiency
technicalProficiency.description: My toolkit is curated for speed, scalability, and aesthetic precision. I focus on modern frameworks that empower creative freedom.

cta.title: Ready to build something luminous?
cta.description: Currently available for freelance opportunities and full-time positions where design matters.
